meaning: adj.黄褐色的,赤褐色的n.赤褐色,黄色苹果之一种
examples: And every fleck of russet showing clear.
One model said while she loved her potato salad outfit, her russet potato skirt was a "little heavy".
The light touched to russet the rings of dark hair escaping from her braids, and made her pale face paler.
Russet rooftops can just be spotted beneath the snow, dripping with exquisite, if murderous-looking, icicles.
The rounded bodywork now russet-brown with rust, it was supposedly the getaway car of diamond thieves, shot long ago by police.
